heading: Repealed. , (5), ,Pub. L. 103–182, title VI, § 690(b)(4)107 Stat. 2223Dec. 8, 1993
label: 1439, 1440 Repealed. , (5), ,Pub. L. 103–182, title VI, § 690(b)(4)107 Stat. 2223Dec. 8, 1993
notes: Section 1439, acts , title IV, § 439, ; , , required master of a vessel from a foreign port or place, immediately upon arrival, to mail or deliver to designated employee a copy of manifest and any corrections thereto.June 17, 1930, ch. 49746 Stat. 712Aug. 8, 1953, ch. 397, § 2(b)67 Stat. 507

Section 1440, acts , title IV, § 440, ; , , required master of a vessel to make post entry of any baggage or merchandise not included on manifest and to mail or deliver such entry to designated employee.June 17, 1930, ch. 49746 Stat. 712Aug. 8, 1953, ch. 397, § 2(c)67 Stat. 508
